raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX shipped a big bad of dog food to my house. The next day I took it back to the XXXX XXXX store in XXXX XXXX, XXXX, TX because I did not order it. The manager refused to take it back. I told my credit card company, XXXX ( Barclay ). Credit card company put a temporary credit. On XX/XX/year> the credit card company took XXXX 's side and put the charge back in my account. I asked the credit card ( XXXX Fraud Dept. ) company for proof send by XXXX. The answer was : XXXX had my name, telephone number, address and credit card information. Yes, they had it because I purchased items from them before. 

I did not order this product and XXXX refuses to take it back. Still, the credit card company is taking their side.
